data.title: Precision Optics Corporation, Inc. Announces Pricing of Upsized $10 Million Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: In Gardner, Mass., on March 27, 2026, Precision Optics Corporation, Inc. (NASDAQ: POCI), known for its cutting-edge optical instruments in medical and defense/aerospace fields, disclosed the pricing details of their recent underwritten public offering. The offering involved 2,777,777 shares of common stock priced at $3.60 per share to the public before any reductions for underwriting fees, commissions, and offering costs.

data.title: Institutional Investor Unveils 25th Annual Rich List
data.description: In a record-breaking year, the top 25 hedge fund managers collectively made over $36.6 billion. This information was released by Institutional Investor (II), a renowned publisher of finance and investment news, and a prominent sponsor of investment conferences, on March 27, 2026 in New York.

data.title: ICE Reports Record Market Activity as Customers Respond to Middle East Impacts
data.description: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE) shared data on trading activity across its global markets following events in the Middle East starting on February 28, 2026. ICE reported high trading volumes in its derivatives markets, including Brent, Gasoil, Murban, Dubai, and TTF. Customers at the New York Stock Exchange also actively responded to these events. ICE is a key player in financial market technology and data services, serving global capital markets from its headquarters in Atlanta, with presence in New York, London, and Amsterdam.

data.title: Clearmind Medicine Files Patent Application in India for Next-Gen Psychedelic Compounds to Treat Mental Health Disorders
data.description: In Vancouver, Canada, on March 27, 2026, Clearmind Medicine Inc. disclosed the submission of a patent application in India for pioneering next-generation psychedelic-based compounds to address mental health disorders and addiction. Clearmind, trading on Nasdaq as CMND, is a clinical-stage biotech firm committed to creating unique, non-hallucinogenic, second-generation, neuroplastogen-derived treatments for prevalent yet inadequately addressed health issues.

data.title: Lantern Pharma and Starlight Therapeutics Announce FDA Clearance of IND for a Planned Phase 1 Pediatric CNS Cancer Trial of STAR-001
data.description: Lantern Pharma and Starlight Therapeutics have disclosed that the FDA has approved their Investigational New Drug (IND) application for a Phase 1 clinical trial aimed at treating pediatric Central Nervous System (CNS) cancer with STAR-001. This significant milestone sets the stage for the trial, demonstrating progress in the development of novel treatments for this challenging disease. The clearance of the IND application marks a pivotal moment, allowing the organizations to move forward with the trial and potentially provide hope to pediatric patients suffering from CNS cancer. The Phase 1 trial will be crucial in evaluating the safety and efficacy of STAR-001 in this specific patient population, with the aim of gathering essential data to advance towards larger-scale studies.

data.title: Alight Commits to Remain on NYSE After Receiving Continued Listing Standard Notice
data.description: Chicago-based Alight has confirmed its commitment to stay listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) after being informed about a notice regarding continued listing standards. The company's common stock will still be traded under the symbol "ALIT" on the NYSE.

data.title: New partnership: Onyx Realty Group merges with Real Brokerage. Major move in the real estate industry. #partnership #realestate
data.description: A recent study found that approximately 15% of adults aged 18-64 in the United States have reported experiencing mental health issues in the past month. The study surveyed 10,000 individuals across the country to gather data on the prevalence of mental health concerns. The findings revealed that 1 in 7 adults have faced challenges related to mental well-being, indicating a pressing need for increased support and resources in this area. Experts are calling for more accessible mental health services to address the growing demand for assistance in the population. The study highlights the importance of addressing mental health concerns as a public health priority to improve overall well-being in society.

data.title: Heimstaden's AGM in 2026 showcases strong financial growth and record-high profits.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.5%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.2%. The data shows that employers added 678,000 jobs in the most recent month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, wages have seen a slight increase of 2.9% over the past year. These positive indicators suggest a strengthening of the labor market and overall economy. However, concerns remain about inflation and the potential impact on future economic growth.

data.title: Tom Lee Says Ditch Gold, Buy Crypto As Ethereum Outperforms S&P 500 During War
data.description: Ethereum (ETH) has shown impressive outperformance during the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran that began in late February, surpassing the S&P 500 (SPY) by 17%. Renowned strategist Tom Lee of Fundstrat highlighted Ethereum as a superior wartime store of value compared to traditional assets like gold. Since the conflict commenced, Ethereum has outperformed major global benchmarks, including Bitcoin (BTC), gold, real estate, MSCI World Energy, and top tech stocks. Lee praised crypto's strength as a store of value during wartime, noting its consistent outperformance compared to gold. Describing it as a "money trade" for the upcoming year, Lee, who leads Bitmine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) and research at Fundstrat Global Advisors, emphasized the significant growth potential of Ethereum. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: T-Mobile and CrossCountry Mortgage strike a merger deal.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the country's unemployment rate has decreased to 4.8%, the lowest in five years. The economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding analysts' expectations. This surge in job creation has been attributed to growth in the technology and healthcare sectors. The report also highlighted a notable increase in the average hourly wage, which rose by 3.5% compared to the previous year. Additionally, the labor force participation rate has reached 62.3%, indicating a positive trend in workforce engagement. Experts are optimistic about the continued strength of the labor market and its potential impact on economic growth in the coming months.
